scripts.build:wrapper: npm run build:linux && npm run wrapper
scripts.create-wrapper:
echo '#!/bin/bash
# Creates an isolated network namespace to bypass proxy blocks
bwrap --dev-bind / / --unshare-net --die-with-parent /bin/bash -c "./AphroArchive & sleep 2 && x-www-browser http://127.0.0.1:3000"' > dist/AphroArchive-Tails.sh && chmod +x dist/AphroArchive-Tails.sh
